PostToolUse.command: ruff format --quiet $FILE && ruff check --fix --quiet $FILE && mypy --no-error-summary $FILE || true

Stop.command: echo 'Verify: Do all tests pass? Is the change consistent with ARCHITECTURE.md?'

PreToolUse.command: python -c "import sys; args = ' '.join(sys.argv); assert 'main' not in args, 'Never commit directly to main'"
